title: Invsee++ Fabric
description: Fabric version of Invsee++, A mod helping admins to manipulate player inventories and enderchests. This mod will still work when target players are offline.
body:
## **InvSee++ Fabric**
InvSee Fabric brings inventory and ender chest viewing to Fabric servers, with support for online and offline player access, player-name suggestions, and a built-in player selection GUI.

### **Commands**


```
/invsee [playername]
```


```
/endersee [playername]
```


```
/invsee
```
-open gui


### **Credit**
This mod was inspired by InvSee++ and adapts a similar workflow for the Fabric ecosystem. 
Invsee++ Plugin: [Invsee++](https://modrinth.com/plugin/invsee++)
